evals.prompt: I have a fullstack app (Next.js frontend, Node.js API, PostgreSQL). I want to validate them in parallel using 2 agents. What are the pitfalls and how do I structure the evidence directories?
evals.expected_output: Should explain that Web and API can parallelize (independent validation journeys) but Database must be seeded before API validation starts (sequential dependency). Should show exact directory structure: e2e-evidence/web-validation/, e2e-evidence/api-validation/, and explain why overlap is forbidden.

evals.prompt: One of my parallel agents failed midway through. I have evidence from 2 other agents. Can I merge the reports, or do I need to rerun all 3?
evals.expected_output: Should explain incomplete evidence = overall FAIL verdict (per aggregation rules). Should advise running only the failed agent again (file ownership ensures clean isolation), then re-aggregating all 3 verdicts. Should clarify that partial success is not acceptable for deployment decisions.
